title: ligularia lagotis
intro: Ligularia lagotis, also known as Levisticum or Selinum, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Ligularia lagotis include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, fever, and skin irritations.
